query: SELECT id, userId, displayName, whatsappName, avatarInitials, createdAt, updatedAt FROM participants WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(displayName,'')) LIKE '%nay%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(whatsappName,'')) LIKE '%nay%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(avatarInitials,'')) LIKE '%nay%' ORDER BY id;
